method: SVD over phi_vecs (16x16); V0 max-cosine via abs(Vt row) at template basis; V1 phi_mip proxy via S^2 dispersion; V2/V3 unable to compute strict (no preserve/distractor pairs)

V2.note: No preserve/distractor pairs available for Llama; AGI/CP2 strict not assessable

V3.note: Same — no perturbation-pair data for Llama
